/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -g  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libgkv2_motor_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libgkv2_motor_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/gkv2_motor_bridge__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/gkv2_motor_bridge/msg/gkv2_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nockorn/robokross_ws/build:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libgkv2_motor_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
